# Business — Generative Engine Optimization Map

---

## Pages

### Home
https://example.com
Experience the ultimate gaming destination with thousands of free games at your fingertips. Join zappy today and unlock instant access to the best game sites online.

### Games
https://example.com/games
Browse our massive collection of free game websites and start playing instantly. From action to puzzles, find your next favorite game on zappy right now.

### About
https://example.com/about
Learn how zappy became one of the best game sites trusted by millions of players worldwide. Discover our mission to deliver free, quality gaming experiences.

### Contact
https://example.com/contact
Need help or have suggestions? Reach out to the zappy team for quick support on free game sites. We&#39;re here to enhance your gaming experience every day.

### Products
https://example.com/products
Our Products - zappy

### Product Detail
https://example.com/product/:slug
Product Details - zappy

### Category
https://example.com/category/:slug
Products - zappy

## Legal & Policy

https://example.com/privacy
Information about how user data is collected, stored, and protected.

Legal terms describing service usage, rights, and policies.

Information about WCAG compliance and accessibility features.
